task_completion.description: Create the stimuli.csv file with required columns and at least 12 rows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor open showing a CSV file with headers 'prime', 'target', 'condition', and 'corrAns', containing at least 12 rows of word/nonword pairs.

task_completion.description: Add a 500ms fixation cross and a 500ms forward mask to the PsychoPy routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder timeline or component properties showing a text component for a fixation cross ('+') and a text component for a mask ('#######'), both with a duration or stop time of 0.5s (500ms).

task_completion.description: Add a prime text component with a very short duration (2 frames or ~33ms).
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy component properties window for the prime showing the text field set to '$prime' and the duration/stop time set to 2 frames (or a time value <= 0.05s).

task_completion.description: Add a target text component and a keyboard response component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy component properties showing a text component with text set to '$target' (with no set end time) and a Keyboard component with allowed keys explicitly showing 'y' and 'n'.

task_completion.description: Save the experiment and CSV files to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title showing 'masked_priming.psyexp' and a file explorer or terminal showing both 'masked_priming.psyexp' and 'stimuli.csv' located in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/masked_priming/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PsychoPy application interface being actively used to add components and set properties, rather than a text editor writing raw XML/PsychoPy code.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or used a script to properly generate the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc), a text editor, or a Python script being used to construct the CSV, rather than just copying a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by downloading a pre-made .psyexp file via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'wget' or 'curl' downloading the final masked_priming.psyexp file directly from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/masked_priming/masked_priming.psyexp. The conditions file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/masked_priming/stimuli.csv and contain at least 12 rows of data. The prime duration in the PsychoPy experiment must be strictly short, with a maximum of 0.05 seconds or 3 frames.
